ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the state in billions of dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the employment data is reported */,
  "employed" TEXT /* Rate of employed individuals in the state */,
  "not_employed" TEXT /* Rate of not employed individuals in the state */,
  "retired" TEXT /* Rate of retired individuals in the state */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state for the given year */,
  "employed_population" INTEGER /* Number of employed individuals */,
  "not_employed_population" INTEGER /* Number of not employed individuals */,
  "retired_population" INTEGER /* Number of retired individuals */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the education data is reported */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Rate of individuals with high school education */,
  "some_college" TEXT /* Rate of individuals with some college education */,
  "college_graduate" TEXT /* Rate of individuals with a college degree */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state for the given year */,
  "high_school_population" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with high school education */,
  "some_college_population" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with some college education */,
  "college_graduate_population" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with a college degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the demographic data is reported */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender distribution in the workforce */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state for the given year */,
  "age_group_population" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in the specified age group */,
  "ethnicity_population" INTEGER /* Number of individuals of the specified ethnicity */,
  "gender_population" INTEGER /* Number of individuals of the specified gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the job type pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the job type data is reported */,
  "job_category" TEXT /* Category of the job (e.g., IT, Healthcare, Education) */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary associated with this job type */,
  "total_employment" INTEGER /* Total number of employed individuals in the job category */,
  "job_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the job category over the past year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_types_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment_rates" (
  "unemployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unemployment rate entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the unemployment rate pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the unemployment rate is reported */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the state */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state for the given year */,
  "unemployed_population" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed individuals */,
  "long_term_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Rate of long-term unemployment (unemployed for 27 weeks or more) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unemployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retirement_data" (
  "retirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retirement data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the retirement data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the retirement data is reported */,
  "retirement_age" INTEGER /* Average retirement age in the state */,
  "retirement_benefits" REAL /* Average retirement benefits received */,
  "total_retired_population" INTEGER /* Total number of retired individuals */,
  "retirement_rate" REAL /* Retirement rate as a percentage of the total population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retirement_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment trend entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the trend data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the employment rate */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in that year */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state for the given year */,
  "employed_population" INTEGER /* Number of employed individuals */,
  "unemployed_population" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed individuals */,
  "employment_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of employment over the past year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiative */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the initiative pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the initiative was launched */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the workforce development initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Funding amount allocated for the initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the initiative (e.g., youth, unemployed, low-income) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the initiative (e.g., number of individuals trained, jobs created) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_initiatives_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
